title: Streaming Thumbnail Campaign
description: Develop thumbnail sets for streaming platforms that hold up at tiny sizes while staying cohesive across rows, genres, and recommendation surfaces.

en.title: Streaming Thumbnail Campaign
en.description: Develop thumbnail sets for streaming platforms that hold up at tiny sizes while staying cohesive across rows, genres, and recommendation surfaces.

zh-CN.title: 流媒体缩略图战役
zh-CN.description: 做 Netflix、Disney+、B站或游戏商店首页那种并排缩略图系统，小尺寸下也要清晰、有类型感、有系列统一性。
